case_title: XOCHILT RAMIREZ ALTAMIRANO VS. THE MOSSER COMPANIES, INC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-01-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-01-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY EZEQVIEL CAZARES---PROPERTY MANAGER. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER---DANIEL NAVARRO. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
